title: asplenium ruta-muraria var. ohionis
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria var. ohionis, also known as the wall-rue or Ohio spleenwort, is a variety of fern native to North America, particularly in the eastern and midwestern regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Asplenium ruta-muraria var. ohionis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
